description: You are a warehouse IT administrator. A legacy MPEG-2 IP camera monitoring the loading dock is continuously broadcasting a UDP stream on udp://@127.0.0.1:5000. Our new security system only accepts modern H.264 RTSP streams. Configure a headless VLC relay to ingest the UDP stream, transcode it to H.264 video (800 kbps) and AAC audio (128 kbps), and duplicate the stream to two simultaneous destinations: an RTSP stream hosted at rtsp://:8554/cam1 and a rolling backup saved to /home/ga/Videos/archive.mp4. Reference the syntax guide at /home/ga/Documents/vlc_streaming_cheatsheet.txt for VLC stream output (sout) parameters. Save the final command in a bash script at /home/ga/start_relay.sh and ensure the relay is running in the background.
